evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Committed to data excellence; ensure high data accuracy; lead data governance processes; robust data models; testing and final acceptance by our internal customers
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, governance, accuracy, and formal testing processes dominate—data excellence framing takes priority over delivery speed.
evidence.domain_risk: FP&A team; steering relevant insights; commercial steering; financial reporting; data accuracy critical for decision-making
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Role supports financial planning and steering decisions, creating high consequence for errors in financial reporting and analysis.
evidence.data_team_maturity: FP&A team; various departments; IT infrastructure/data integration team; data governance process; sophisticated data models
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named teams (FP&A, IT, departments) with governance processes and sophisticated infrastructure suggest mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop and maintain PowerBI dashboards and reports—from initial design and implementation to testing and final acceptance; Solve complex issues with robust data models; automate analysis methods using SQL, PowerQuery, DAX and Python
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical context (PowerBI, DAX, PowerQuery, robust data models, testing/acceptance cycles) shows hiring manager detail about actual BI engineering work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: FP&A (financial planning & analysis) team; steering relevant insights; commercial steering; executive decision-making support
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary focus is supporting FP&A and financial steering—finance orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Define data requirements; create BI solutions; lead data governance process; implement requirements for data models; act as main point of contact
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role owns BI strategy execution, data requirements definition, and governance leadership—clear strategic ownership of analytics function.
evidence.ai_role: Apply modern analytics such as machine learning to support the business by flagging risks and opportunities from data trends
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate is expected to use AI/ML tools to accelerate their analytical work and generate insights.
evidence.testing_framing: Testing and final acceptance by our internal customers; lead data governance processes and ensure high data accuracy
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and quality assurance are owned responsibilities with formal acceptance processes—candidate is accountable.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Committed to data excellence; ensure high data accuracy; lead data governance processes; FP&A steering; commercial steering; flagging risks and opportunities
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High emphasis on accuracy, governance, and risk flagging for financial steering—fear is bad data affecting financial decisions and steering.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop and maintain PowerBI dashboards; continuously improve data queries and performance; implementing requirements
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Dominant verbs focus on developing/improving/maintaining existing BI solutions rather than building from zero.
evidence.loss_aversion: Committed to data excellence and ensure high data accuracy; lead data governance processes; flagging risks and opportunities. Role emphasizes accuracy and governance for financial steering.
